players.name: Cal Raleigh
players.summary: 2-for-3 with a HR at OAK. Batting .178 with 4 HR — power is there, average lagging.

players.name: Bryce Harper
players.summary: 1-for-4 with a HR in 7-4 road loss at CHC. Batting .258 with 4 HR — quietly trending up.

players.name: Luis Arraez
players.summary: Placed on 7-day concussion IL April 21 after head collision with Christian Walker (HOU) sprinting out a sac bunt on April 20. Return timeline TBD.

players.name: Bo Bichette
players.summary: 1-for-4, no extra-base hits. Batting .210 — off to a slow start in first NYM season.

players.name: Francisco Lindor
players.summary: 1-for-3 with a 3-run HR vs MIN. Batting .181 but 2 HR and 5 RBI — finding his power stroke.

players.name: Pete Crow-Armstrong
players.summary: 2-for-4, 2 R, 1 RBI in CHC win. Batting .270 with team-high 14 R — elite speed and contact.

players.name: Jackson Merrill
players.summary: 0-for-4 at COL. Batting .211 — slumping after strong April start. Still 3 HR, 13 RBI.

players.name: Teoscar Hernandez
players.summary: 1-for-4 with a run at SFG. Batting .302 with 4 HR — best average on the roster.

players.name: Giancarlo Stanton
players.summary: 2-for-4, 2-run HR, 3 RBI at BOS. Batting .339 with 3 HR and 13 RBI — best YTD points on the team.

players.name: Devin Williams
players.summary: Blown save vs MIN — 0 IP, 1 H, 2 BB, 2 ER. ERA now 9.95. Control issues early in 2026.

players.name: Chase Burns
players.summary: 5.2 IP, 5 H, 2 ER, 8 K, 2 BB — W at TB. ERA down to 1.62 in 3 GS. Historic start to 2026.

players.name: Zack Wheeler
players.summary: Still on 15-day IL (thoracic outlet surgery Sept 2025). On track for Saturday April 25 debut vs ATL — limited to 6 IP/90 pitches.

players.name: Cole Ragans
players.summary: Between starts. KCR beat BAL 6-5 on April 21. Ragans at 6.00 ERA, 18 BB in 21 IP — command is a concern.

players.name: Nathan Eovaldi
players.summary: Between starts. TEX lost to PIT. Eovaldi at 5.40 ERA in 4 GS — solid K rate (26 K) but ERA climbing.

players.name: Emmet Sheehan
players.summary: Between starts. Yamamoto took the April 21 start vs SFG. Sheehan at 6.43 ERA in 3 GS, 14 IP.

players.name: Reid Detmers
players.summary: Started April 20 vs TOR (6 IP, 4 ER, 5 K). Season: 34.67 IP, 3.89 ERA, 6 GS. Next start likely April 25-26.

injuries.name: Luis Arraez
injuries.note: Head collision with Christian Walker (HOU) on April 20 sprinting out a sacrifice bunt. Placed on 7-day concussion IL April 21. Return timeline TBD.

injuries.name: Zack Wheeler
injuries.note: 2026 debut set for Saturday April 25 vs Atlanta Braves, limited to 6 IP/90 pitches. Thoracic outlet surgery September 2025.
